caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 

This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my  Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress!

💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

This is the only dog-friendly theme park in Florida! 🦖🐶 Grab your leash and your sense of adventure because Fido can join the fun too!

Dinosaur World in Plant City has been a quirky roadside attraction since 1998.  Wander paved paths and boardwalks with over 200 life-size dinosaurs, explore fossil digs, pan for gems, and discover prehistoric exhibits all across the 20+ acres.

There’s a splash pad, playground, food truck and a gift shop too!

🎟️ Tickets:
General admission runs around $19.95–$24.95 (kids under 2 are free)

🕐 Hours:
Open daily from ~9 AM to 5 PM 

📍 Address:
5145 Harvey Tew Rd, Plant City, FL 33565 🇺🇸
